summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: Nothing's flagging right now — your knees, lower body, shoulders, neck, all your usual watch areas feel quiet and ready. You're built to come back through steady, consistent rest rather than big dramatic swings, and last night did exactly that — you settled in deep and your body feels calm and topped up this morning.

Performance: Train normally. You came in a little above your usual baseline across the board, so the day's a green light — settle into your normal work and lean harder if it's flowing, just keep your form clean. With nothing logged yet and the tank full, you've got plenty to spend today.

Transit: none
